process_passport.source_basis: Synthetic upstream extraction_table passport and one workflow claim supplied inline in the prompt; target literature-review-mapper instructions and process-passport policy were reviewed. No source texts, bibliography, locators, full text, or external evidence were available.
process_passport.source_access_level: citation only; abstract only; no full text access
process_passport.corpus_coverage: Partial workflow fixture corpus; representativeness and counter-literature are not verified.
tool_use: No external lookup; deterministic local workflow-passport fixture only.
Local read of allowed prompt, process-passport policy, and literature-review-mapper instructions.
unresolved_risks: Extraction rows come from excerpts and abstract-only notes; rival literature and locators remain unchecked.
Literature-review schools, debates, consensus, genealogy, and gaps cannot be established from the supplied extraction summary alone.
The downstream map may preserve a provisional pattern only; it cannot validate source-claim fit, representative coverage, or currentness.
handoff_limits: Do not convert extraction patterns into field consensus.
Do not cite this artifact as a verified literature map, consensus statement, novelty claim, or gap analysis.
Do not infer representative authors, canonical works, current debate status, or absence of counter-literature from this artifact.
process_passport.intended_next_skill_or_use: human verification before downstream literature-review reliance

literature_map.source_basis: Input extraction_table artifact with process passport; no full-text sources or locators were available for downstream synthesis.
what_i_can_verify: The upstream artifact records a partial, unverified extraction pattern claim.
The upstream passport explicitly states citation-only, abstract-only, and no-full-text access.
The upstream passport requires human review before downstream reliance.
what_remains_uncertain: The topic, discipline, source identities, source quality, methods, and locators are not visible in the supplied artifact.
Counter-literature, rival interpretations, and corpus representativeness are unchecked.
No field consensus, debate structure, genealogy, or gap claim can be verified from the supplied input.
user_verification_needed: Review original source texts and locators before relying on any extracted pattern.
Verify whether the corpus is representative for the intended field and research question.
Check rival literature before using the pattern to shape argument, novelty, or thesis claims.
literature_map.corpus_limits: The supplied corpus is a partial workflow fixture with no visible bibliography, source list, full text, methods, or locators.
literature_map.claim_limit: Treat the map as a provisional uncertainty-preserving handoff only, not as a literature review of a field.
literature_map.counter_literature_check: Not performed; rival literature and counter-evidence remain unchecked.
literature_map.field_overview: Unavailable from the supplied artifact. The only visible field-structure signal is an unverified pattern suggested by several extracted notes.
literature_map.school_mapping_status: Not enough visible source detail to cluster sources by assumptions, methods, theories, or conclusions.
literature_map.debate_mapping_status: No debates can be mapped because representative authors, evidence bases, and competing positions are not provided.

consensus_controversy_map.claim: Several extracted notes suggest a pattern, but the pattern is unverified outside the partial packet.

literature_map.genealogy_status: Not available from the supplied artifact; no source chronology, canonical works, or methodological shifts are visible.
literature_map.gap_status: No field gap can be claimed; only a workflow evidence gap is visible.
how_this_literature_shapes_the_book_thes: At most, the unverified pattern can be carried forward as a hypothesis for human source review.
sources_still_needed: Original source texts for every extraction row.
Complete bibliography or source list with locators.
Counter-literature and rival interpretations relevant to the intended field.
Human-reviewed source-claim fit notes before manuscript reliance.
limits_failure_risks: A downstream user could mistake a partial extraction pattern for field consensus.
A missing-source packet could make the book thesis appear better supported than it is.
Locator gaps prevent citation audit, quotation verification, and reliable synthesis.

workflow_claims.claim: Several extracted notes suggest a pattern, but the pattern is unverified outside the partial packet.
